# programs.z-lua

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.z-lua`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| -------------------------------------- | ---------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.z-lua.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable z.lua. |
| `programs.z-lua.enableAliases` | `boolean` | Whether to enable recommended z.lua aliases. |
| `programs.z-lua.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.z-lua.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.z-lua.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.z-lua.options` | `list of string` | List of options to pass to z.lua. |
| `programs.z-lua.package` | `package` | The z-lua package to use. |
